name: ModelHistory
summary: The ModelHistory class provides history information about the objects of the model that is currently open in Tekla Structures.

methods.name: GetCurrentModificationStamp
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use TakeModifications() instead.")] public static ModificationStamp GetCurrentModificationStamp()
methods.summary: Gets the current modification stamp from the model.

methods.name: GetDeletedObjects
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use TakeModifications() instead.")] public static ModelObjectEnumerator GetDeletedObjects(ModificationStamp ModStamp)
methods.summary: Gets a list of the objects that have been deleted after the modification stamp.

returns.doc: A list of the objects that have been deleted after the given modification stamp.

methods.name: GetDeletedObjectsWithType
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use TakeModifications() instead.")] public static ModelObjectEnumerator GetDeletedObjectsWithType(ModificationStamp ModStamp, ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum Enum)
methods.summary: Gets based on type a list of the objects that have been deleted after the modification stamp.

params.name: Enum
params.doc: The type of the objects to return.

returns.doc: A list of the objects that have been deleted after the given modification stamp.

methods.name: GetLocalChanges
methods.summary: Get changes which are not written out.

returns.doc: Modifications which are not written out.

methods.name: GetModifications(String, ModificationStamp)
methods.signature: public static ModificationInfo GetModifications(string Name, ModificationStamp PrevStamp = null)
methods.summary: Lookup modifications since previous call of TakeModifications() without resetting the modstamp
methods.remarks: Takes modification which has happened to the model since the previous call to TakeModifications with the same Name argument. If there was no previous call of TakeModifications() with this Name, shows modifications since beginning, or since PrevStap, if it is specified.

params.name: Name
params.doc: Name of reference which is used for collecting modifications and which is updated. Intended use is to assign an unique name for each client application which needs to be informed of the model updates. Maximum length is 79 characters.

params.name: PrevStamp
params.doc: When specified, default value of reference if is it not found

returns.doc: All modifications which happened since the last call

methods.name: GetModifications(String, IEnumerable<ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum>, ModificationStamp)
methods.signature: public static ModificationInfo GetModifications(string Name, IEnumerable<ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum> ObjectTypes, ModificationStamp PrevStamp = null)
methods.summary: Lookup modifications since previous call of TakeModifications() without resetting the modstamp, with object type filtering
methods.remarks: Same as GetModifications(String, ModificationStamp), but returns only the types listed in ObjectTypes.

params.name: Name
params.doc: Name of reference which is used for collecting modifications and which is updated. Intended use is to assign an unique name for each client application which needs to be informed of the model updates. Maximum length is 79 characters.

params.name: ObjectTypes
params.doc: Types of object to select. Empty or null selects all types.

params.name: PrevStamp
params.doc: When specified, default value of reference if is it not found

returns.doc: All modifications which happened since the last call

methods.name: GetModifiedObjects
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use TakeModifications() instead.")] public static ModelObjectEnumerator GetModifiedObjects(ModificationStamp ModStamp)
methods.summary: Gets a list of the objects that have been added or modified after the modification stamp.

returns.doc: A list of the objects that have been modified after the given modification stamp.

methods.name: GetModifiedObjectsWithType
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use TakeModifications() instead.")] public static ModelObjectEnumerator GetModifiedObjectsWithType(ModificationStamp ModStamp, ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum Enum)
methods.summary: Gets based on type a list of the objects that have been added or modified after the modification stamp.

params.name: Enum
params.doc: The type of the objects to return.

returns.doc: A list of the objects that have been modified after the given modification stamp.

methods.name: GetNotSharedObjects
methods.summary: Get object which are was created or modified since last ModelSharing WriteOut.
methods.remarks: If the model is not shared, returns all objects.

methods.name: TakeModifications(String, ModificationStamp)
methods.signature: public static ModificationInfo TakeModifications(string Name, ModificationStamp PrevStamp = null)
methods.remarks: Takes modification which has happened to the model since the previous call to TakeModifications with the same Name argument. If there was no previous call with this Name, shows modifications since beginning, or since PrevStap, if it is specified. Updates internal reference for use when TakeModifications() is called next time.

params.name: Name
params.doc: Name of reference which is used for collecting modifications and which is updated. Intended use is to assign an unique name for each client application which needs to be informed of the model updates. Maximum length is 79 characters.

params.name: PrevStamp
params.doc: When specified, default value of reference if is it not found

returns.doc: All modifications which happened since the last call. See ModificationInfo reference

methods.name: TakeModifications(String, IEnumerable<ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum>, ModificationStamp)
methods.signature: public static ModificationInfo TakeModifications(string Name, IEnumerable<ModelObject.ModelObjectEnum> ObjectTypes, ModificationStamp PrevStamp = null)
methods.summary: Take modifications since previous call, with object type filtering.
methods.remarks: Same as TakeModifications(String, ModificationStamp), but returns only the types listed in ObjectTypes. Note that since this function also sets base for the next invocation of for ALL objects, so using it discards change information for filtered objects.

params.name: Name
params.doc: Name of reference which is used for collecting modifications and which is updated. Intended use is to assign an unique name for each client application which needs to be informed of the model updates. Maximum length is 79 characters.

params.name: ObjectTypes
params.doc: Types of object to select. Empty or null selects all types.

params.name: PrevStamp
params.doc: When specified, default value of reference if is it not found

returns.doc: All modifications which happened since the last call. See ModificationInfo reference

methods.name: UpdateModificationStampToLatest
methods.summary: Updates the modification stamp to latest.
